name: occasional-empty-retrieval
description: 8% of customer-support-bot retrieval spans return 0 results. But the bot handles this gracefully by asking the user to clarify. All traces complete successfully. This is a normal UX flow, not an error.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

retrieval.note: all traces with empty retrieval completed successfully — bot asks user to clarify

spans.note: clarification LLM call triggered after empty retrieval
empty results are not span errors — they return successfully with 0 results
